# An Oasis emerges   in Hallandale Beach.

SWIPE DOWN FOR MORE

A 10-acre mixed-use landmark development in Hallandale Beach, Florida, featuring two 25-story condominium towers designed by Arquitectonica. The West Tower has topped off, with 75% of its units sold, while sales have commenced for the East Tower, offering luxury residences with expansive floor-to-ceiling windows and wraparound balconies.

##### RETAIL

### Live It Up, From Downstairs to Down the Block

Oasis Hallandale offer countless possibilities with 59,219 square feet of retail and restaurant space, 34,691 square feet of office space, and 1,486 parking spaces, including valet parking.

Residents and visitors are greeted by a six-story waterfall and a beautiful entrance framed by water fountains, urban parks and lush shade trees designed for sitting amid nature.

For offices, this destination presents a refreshing work environment at a prime location. Bring your office close to home and have the shortest commute ever. Here, patrons will feel the Oasis vibe while relaxing by fountains and parks. Come for work and stay for happy hour or meet for brunch and shop all afternoon.

### Oasis redefines the Hallandale skyline.

Oasis Hallandale is a large scale, mixed-use development in Hallandale Beach, Florida built on a 10-acre (4-hectare) lot located with close proximity to the beaches and nearby landmarks such as Gulfstream Park Racing and Casino and the renowned Aventura Mall.

Two 25-story residential towers are in alignment forming a gateway offering ocean views and each tower containing 250 residential units typically 1,843 SF (171 m2). The design intent is so that the vertical curves erode the corners of the balconies in symmetry as the towers frame the skies and create a distinctive silhouette that will become the landmark of Hallandale.

The development includes five commercial buildings — with a total 56,739 SF (5,271 m2) of retail and restaurant space — 17,709 SF (1,645 m2) of office space and 1,481 parking spaces. Amenities include indoor and outdoor movie theaters, a 21,000 SF (1,951 m2) indoor gym, ping-pong room, pool deck and 24-hour lobby attendants. The mixed-use nature of the program embodies the principles of environmentally-friendly planning encouraging residents to walk rather than drive to shop, dine or work.

### A lifestyle beyond   the ordinary

Experience the future of luxury in Hallandale Beach. Select from one, two and three-bedroom/ flow-through floorplans that bring the outdoors through brilliant walls of glass. Select the location of your residence based on your favorite eye candy, whether it’s the skyline, the ocean, or the equestrian views at nearby Gulfstream Park. Relax and entertain on your spacious balcony. Masterful kitchens feature a seamless one-piece countertop with integrated sink, imported Italian cabinetry, and stainless-steel appliances—including a sleek glass-top stove. Elegant bathrooms echo this elevated quality with matching countertops and sinks, refined Italian-made cabinetry, and a frameless glass shower.

When complete, the entire project, designed byArquitectonica, will include two 25-story towers with 500 residences from 897 square feet to 4,756 square feet and willserve as the anchor of a new live/work/play center that will include 59,000 square feet of retail and restaurant spaceand 35,000 square feet of office space.

[READ MORE](https://www.qgdigitalpublishing.com/publication/?i=814156&p=70&view=issueViewer)

### It’s a wow’: $370 million luxury mixed-use project coming to Hallandale Beach

![It’s a wow’: $370 million luxury mixed-use project coming to Hallandale Beach](https://hallandaleoasis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/SunSentine_l07.25.25.jpg)

sun sentinel

November 11, 2023

BY: sun-sentinel.com

The town’s first pedestrian-friendly city center, the 10-acre project calls for 25-story twin condo towers surrounded by trendy restaurants, upscale shops, a gourmet food market, office space and a high-profile art gallery. Oasis Hallandale, a $370 million luxury development on the rise along Hallandale Beach Boulevard.

[READ MORE](https://www.sun-sentinel.com/2023/11/11/its-a-wow-370-million-luxury-mixed-use-project-coming-to-hallandale-beach/)

## Your Oasis Awaits

Contact the Sales Gallery to learn more about Oasis Hallandale

![a city with many buildings and a body of water](https://hallandaleoasis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Hallandale-Oasis_AERIAL.jpg)

### The New Hub   of Connectivity

![Oasis Key Location Distances](https://hallandaleoasis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Oasis_Map.gif)

Strategically positioned near South Florida’s major airports—Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International, Miami International, and Opa-Locka Executive—Oasis Hallandale offers unparalleled connectivity for both business and leisure travelers. Whether you’re flying in for work, jetting off for a getaway, or welcoming international guests, the convenience of having three major airports within close reach ensures seamless travel experiences.

It is within convenient proximity to Hallandale Beach, Gulfstream Park, Hollywood Boardwalk, Aventura Mall, the Hard Rock Casino, Fort Lauderdale’s Airport and Cruise Ships Port.

Oasis Hallandale’s distinguished architecture, design and physical features will be your private oasis to live, work and enjoy.
